programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates a death threat against Sigmund Freud and gets an unwelcome analysis.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After Murdoch arrests a man for trying to kill a woman he claims is a witch, the man dies mysteriously while in custody.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch's son Harry is visiting from boarding school when he and Ogden are abducted by a nefarious, vengeful foe.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A charity basketball game turns dour for Murdoch and his colleagues when a friend of the game's inventor is murdered.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Violet Hart investigates when a protester dies at an event for Black people's rights.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A friend from Bull's past enlists his services to help convince a jury that a domestic abuse survivor who shot her husband in his sleep is not guilty of murder because she feared for her life and the life of her unborn child.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team takes on a seemingly unwinnable case; a mute man faces the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson; Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team is rocked when a client is found guilty of murder; the team finds new evidence but must find a way to present it in court without being found in contempt; Marissa faces hard truths about her relationship with Bull.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A precocious young writer becomes involved with her high school creative writing teacher.

programme.title: Regression
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Emma Watson star in this thriller about a small town crime that unmasks a horrifying mystery.

programme.title: Above Suspicion
programme.desc: The true-crime story leading to the first-ever conviction of an F.B.I. Agent for murder.

programme.title: Affairs of State
programme.desc: A young DC aide kickstarts his government career by sleeping with powerful women.

programme.title: 10th & Wolf [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: While serving in the military, a Marine sergeant (James Marsden) believes his family's ties to organized crime are a thing of the past. However, an act of insubordination and a visit from the F.B.I. send him packing to his South Philadelphia hometown, and he discovers that his brother (Brad Renfro) and his cousin (Giovanni Ribisi) have become entangled with mobsters, leaving him with only one way to save them.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Homicide
programme.desc: A Jewish homicide detective investigates a seemingly minor murder and falls in with a Zionist group as a result.

programme.title: Pacific Heights
programme.desc: A couple work hard to renovate their dream house and become landlords to pay for it.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man learns to survive in prison.

programme.title: Until Death
programme.desc: Anthony Stowe is a dirty cop who is hooked on heroin—and everyone hates him. After a serious accident, he is placed into an induced coma, but emerges from it a better person who wants to put things right.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: A lifelong loser rescues the victims of a plane crash but an impostor gets the glory.

programme.title: Tortured
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent faces a moral dilemma when he's asked to torture a member of one of the world's most powerful crime syndicates.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: In this carefully crafted suspense thriller, a group of problem students at an exclusive Northeastern prep school band together to wage a desperate and deadly campaign against terrorists who lay siege to their school in an effort to free a Colombian drug lord from an American prison.

programme.title: Scandal Sheet
programme.desc: A newspaper editor's efforts to end his ex-wife's blackmail attempt become the focus of an investigative story by his ambitious protégé.

programme.title: Fail Safe
programme.desc: American planes are sent to deliver a nuclear attack on Moscow, but it's a mistake due to an electrical malfunction. Can all-out war be averted?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: The escape of Bubber Reeves from prison affects the inhabitants of a small Southern town.

programme.title: Shopworn
programme.desc: Stanwyck is a waitress engaged to Toomey though his mother opposes her son's marriage to Stanwyck. After her release, from a three-month prison sentence, Stanwyck becomes an overnight musical sensation and renews her romance with Toomey and his mother finally consents to the marriage.

programme.title: The Wendell Baker Story
programme.desc: Luke Wilson plays a good-hearted ex-con who gets a job in a retirement hotel. Three elderly residents help him win back his girlfriend as he lends them a hand in fighting hotel corruption.

programme.title: The Devil Bat
programme.desc: A mad scientist develops an aftershave lotion that causes his gigantic bats to kill anyone who wears it.

programme.title: Silent Hill: Revelation
programme.desc: Return to a place of insanity and blood-curdling chills in this shocking sequel to one of the most surreal and gruesome horror films ever created. Heather Mason (Adelaide Clemens) and her father (Sean Bean) have always tried to stay one step ahead of the malevolent forces intent on their destruction. But on the eve of her 18th birthday, a dangerous revelation leads her deeper into a demonic world that threatens to trap her in a nightmarish landscape forever.

programme.title: Guns Of Redemption
programme.desc: A scarred gunslinger tries leaving violence behind, but his past catches up. Near death from an ambush, he straps on his guns for one final mission: to save two captives and avenge a murdered priest before time runs out.

programme.title: Man Of The Year
programme.desc: A comedian who hosts a news satire program decides to run for president, and a computerized voting machine malfunction gets him elected.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own..

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: Blood Brother
programme.desc: Jake goes to prison to protect his friends, and one becomes a cop. When Jake is released, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: Semper Fi
programme.desc: When his brother is given an unfair prison sentence, a Marine is torn between his code and loyalty to family.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: Michael goes undercover to take justice into his own hands after his brother is murdered by a gang.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: Released from prison, a kung-fu expert tries to help the police find a vicious serial killer who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: Gundala
programme.desc: Gundala, who has grown up on the streets, must choose between continuing to look out for himself or doing something about the injustice that surrounds him.

programme.title: Hunt the Wicked
programme.desc: Detective Huang Mingjin faces off against criminal mastermind Wei Yunzhou in a city plagued by dark secrets. As police and criminals flood the streets, Huang must unravel the city's sinister core while engaging in a cat-and-mouse game with Wei.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three middle-aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

programme.title: Perfect Child
programme.desc: PR exec's new love threatened by jealous ex, single dad drama ensues.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Pretty Little Addict
programme.desc: Jennifer Phillips starts drinking after her father's death and injures Colin.

programme.title: My Mom's Letter From Heaven
programme.desc: A lost letter is found and helps the relationship between a father and daughter.

programme.title: Perfect Child
programme.desc: PR exec's new love threatened by jealous ex, single dad drama ensues.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: A Slice of Romance
programme.desc: PR exec Mikayla strikes a deal with pastry chef Austin to rebrand his café to get dating advice.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: Candid About Love
programme.desc: Laura must get reclusive artist Shane to premiere his work at a gallery to help her own career.

programme.title: WWJD2 The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled teenage boy helps an aging wood carver finish an impossibly difficult job.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Judge Knott
programme.desc: A father’s horrible mistake causes a lifetime of pain for his children. His son tries his best to live a normal life, but his childhood trauma follows him into his marriage. He must face his trauma head on to break this generational curse.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find that two young siblings have taken up residence in their home, and have now claimed legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with two strangers, they must play their wicked games and survive psychological terror as the legal system takes its time.

programme.title: For You I Will
programme.desc: Mikayla is a struggling hopeless romantic. When she meets Jalen, she thinks she’s found the one, but he wants a possession over a partner. He demands her loyalty by asking her for a hit list of all of her ex-boyfriends to secure his love. Will she walk away? Or let her desperation consume her and fall into a deadly trap?

programme.title: Under the Gun
programme.desc: Cam is a troubled street hustler battling addiction, grief, and mounting debt, as his recklessness threatens to dismantle the tight-knit crime family that raised him. When his brother and trusted runner, Jalen, is caught stealing, his punishment sets off a chain reaction of fear, suspicion, and violence.

programme.title: Oceans Rising
programme.desc: A scientist builds a massive ark after his warnings of an Earth destroying flood are ignored.

programme.title: Robotapocalypse
programme.desc: An expert hacker tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: Thor: God of Thunder
programme.desc: Loki escapes Asgard to gain dominion of Earth. Thor must stop him before it’s too late.

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on sea life, a new breed of shark breaks through.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 3: Lake of Fire (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Set one year after the events of HELL HOUSE LLC 2, the Abaddon Hotel is on the verge of being torn down. It is purchased by billionaire Russell Wynn as the new home for his popular interactive show, Insomnia. He invites Vanessa Sheppard and her film crew to record everything leading up to the performance. They encounter a nefarious plot - one that threatens to unleash a veritable hell on earth.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 2
programme.desc: It's been eight years since the opening night tragedy of Hell House, LLC and still many unanswered questions remain. Thanks to an anonymous tip, investigative journalist Jessica Fox is convinced that key evidence is hidden inside the abandoned Abaddon Hotel-evidence that will shed light on the hotel's mysteries. She assembles a team equally hungry for answers with one goal: break into the hotel and discover the truth.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A struggling bookstore owner finds unpublished works of George Romero, but the comics lead to new troubles. Then, Shelby's mom struggles to accept that her baby is growing up, but hanging on to childhood relics isn't as harmless as she thinks.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, a drinking habit becomes insatiable. Then, dolls are Evie's favorite companions, but when a severed toy head appears in her dollhouse, Evie can no longer protect them.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A platoon of American soldiers finds something more sinister than war behind enemy lines. Then, a man with a passion for found objects finds something particularly odd: a finger ... and it's growing.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Teens who go trick-or-treating are met with fear instead of smiles and sweets. Then, Justin brings home the wrong suitcase and is shocked to find a living man stuffed inside.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Harry stumbles upon an old scarecrow and brings it to life. Then, Lydia kills her lover and needs to hide the evidence, but after an earthquake she gets trapped inside an elevator with the body.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A killer gets stranded in a funeral home with a mortician and his monkey paw. Then, former Mayor Barkley is in prison, and with his most loyal supporters locked up too, his odds don't look good.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan discovers a cure to weight loss in a rare fat-sucking leech. Then, Rose believes she found Champ, the legendary monster of Lake Champlain, but the real monster may still be out there.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Joe's closest friends are the model toys of his favorite scary movie monsters. Then, a Public TV station is overwhelmed when the appraisal of an antique book accidentally summons a dark force.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A marketing ploy at a haunted Bed and Breakfast becomes way too realistic. Then, an exterminator gets more than he bargained for when he takes on a big job.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly attempts to make a viral "Croffle" (croissant waffle) out of puff pastry, but chaos ensues when he messes up the first try. Pivoting quickly, he serves it up as a warm dessert with ice cream and chocolate syrup. The hosts hilariously discuss the realities of aging and male menopause.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa visits a local cow farm in search of fresh milk to make homemade ice cream, only to find out that the Scottish Highlands at the farm aren't dairy cows. But the second farm she visits does raise dairy cows, so Lisa tries her hand at milking, then shares bowls of homemade blackberry basil ice cream for a few friends to enjoy after a day on the lake.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa introduces several of her favorite ducks including a solid black Cayuga and a "spotted duck" also known as the Ancona breed, as well as her Buff Goose, discusses the various breeds of waterfowl, and compares the various sizes and colors of duck and goose eggs. Then she makes savory souffles with some of her duck eggs.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Maine is known for its wild blueberries. After a trip to a local blueberry farm at the height of the harvest, Lisa is excited to bake blueberry cobbler with homemade whipped cream, and she also makes blueberry ice pops for her flock to help them stay cool.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa prepares a holiday meal for friends, but instead of turkey, she decides to highlight some traditional New England Thanksgiving recipes including spiced cranberry sauce, popovers, seafood chowder, and a sweet Indian pudding. And of course she shares some of the scraps and leftovers with her chickens so they can enjoy their own holiday feast.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores medieval English taverns, inns, and alehouses, each serving different roles and social classes. Taverns sold wine, inns provided lodging, and alehouses were private homes selling ale. The episode covers wine quality control, bread and ale laws, and their reputations for gambling and excess. He recreates bokenade, a beef pottage with saffron, cloves, and verjuice.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the Old West saloon as a social hub for food and drink. He covers its evolving design, popular beverages like whiskey, beer, champagne, and cocktails, gambling games such as poker, and the famous “free lunch” tradition. The episode highlights regional foods, oysters’ popularity, and recreates an 1886 pork and beans recipe from *Cooking for Profit*.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores WWII home front rationing in the U.S., from 1942 sugar limits to the red and blue point system for meat, dairy, and canned goods. He covers price controls, Victory Gardens, labor shortages, internment camps, and black-market “meatleggers.” He also recreates Betty Crocker’s “emergency steak,” a budget-friendly mix of ground beef, cereal, and milk.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s luxurious first class, from modest suites to lavish parlor suites with private promenades. He covers dining in the saloon and Ritz, daily meals, amenities like the gym and Turkish bath, and the 10+ course final dinner. Using survivor accounts, he recreates the famous peaches in Chartreuse jelly dessert from April 14, 1912.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s first class breakfast from April 11, 1912, featuring over a dozen dishes by Escoffier. He recreates baked apples, smoked salmon coronets, shirred eggs, and buckwheat cakes with blackcurrant conserve. The episode highlights dining venues, passenger pets, and the tragic story of honeymooners Victor and Maria Josefa Peñasco.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the 4–6 month, 2,200-mile Oregon Trail journey (1846–1869), covering provisions like flour, bacon, and hardtack, cooking over buffalo chips, and staple meals like Johnny cakes. He discusses hunting, trading with Native Americans, celebrations, and hardships, including spoiled food, salt-rising bread, pies, and pioneers leaving possessions at Fort Laramie.

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores Nuevo León: the land of cabrito and carne asada. Here, chefs challenge the state’s culinary stereotypes, transforming traditional flavors into exciting new experiences.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Homeowners Neil & Yvonne challenge Mar to makeover a pool area-adjacent media room and make it all-season functional for entertaining. Mar uses his 6 exclusive Casual Luxury design principles to completely re-think the area, including reclaiming basement space to add a bonus kitchenette & full bath. Walls and a fireplace must go! Will the family be ready to entertain-and will they love the reveal?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Witness the renovation evolution of some truly reMARkable outdoor living spaces: new pergola, new pool deck and new sun deck. (You won't believe the magical makeover transformation of the garage roof!) And Mar gets a visit from a TV friend, who he sneaks in for peek at the progress before the family gets their final look at the space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Can Mar handle a surprise project? You bet. Follow this unplanned-for renovation and design overhaul of the main floor family room and living room. Mar's hope for the reveal? That the O'Kane family will love the relaxed feeling of the family room and how he's upping the glamour quotient of the living room. Meanwhile, a secret time capsule sheds light on the home's history.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Watch as the landscape makeover design takes shape, going from overgrown and out of place to perfectly balanced, for the ultimate Casual Luxury curb appeal. Sometimes, the design process hurts. Mar needs the homeowner, Yvonne, to put nostalgic connections aside in order to handle the extensive renovations required.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Time to gut and renovate two out-of-date and well-used kids' bathrooms! As payback for being displaced, the 3 kids 'treat' Mar to the Trapeze School of New York-he responds with a trip to Six Flags new England. (Cue the screaming.) Meanwhile, the transformational Casual Luxury bathroom makeovers are taking shape. After only a few surprises and challenges, this reveal is the kids' favorite one yet.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It's 'Lost in Space' because somehow these home makeover clips never made it to Mar's! Bloopers Alert! Unseen Tips Alert! Inspired by viewer feedback, an entire show that includes highlights of the greatest gaffs, goofs and guffaws. Plus, some renovation and makeover projects never before aired.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar Jennings uses his 6 Casual Luxury design principles to transform a typical master bedroom, closets and bath into a boutique, hotel-style oasis. The O'Kanes are desperate to stop sleeping on their couches and get back into their master bedroom - but with a new cathedral ceiling installation, private deck installation, custom vanities, several setbacks and delays this renovation won't be easy.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Not only does Mar Jennings have the task of pleasing the adult O'Kanes, but he has to satisfy Teddy, a young man between childhood and young adulthood. AND try to make space in an already-small bedroom. Can it even be done? All while juggling two desk and office spaces-for Teddy and his parents. Mar's unexpected solutions for this kids bedroom and office makeover are truly Casual Luxury.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: More things that regular episodes just couldn't fit in, so we say they didn't quite make it to Mar's! Filled with some of Mar's favorite people and places that viewers wanted to see more of, and of course some delightfully hilarious bloopers, too. Plus, more renovation, makeover and design sMARt tips (like fixing uneven floors) and great locations. As always, Casual Luxury has no boundaries.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar is tasked with carving out two new basement rooms from storage space: a studio and laundry room. With Mar's 6 design principles, he must make dark and dank become bright and stunning. The homeowners expect to be wowed by these 'creative' and 'clean' space makeovers, but with pipes and beams in the way and unexpected challenges, this project might just push Mar over the edge.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Any home makeover has its ups and downs, but it's literally true with this staircase and foyer. Mar renovates the home's core areas, illustrating how to reclaim needed space, while creating impactful design that doesn't compete with adjacent rooms. An unexpected find-a gorgeous chandelier from a famous NY building-will be the perfect finishing touch if it makes it through the tricky installation.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Big Finale features Mar designing two useful, decorative his-and-hers structures to grace the pool area. Sheds become elevated design when form follows function--and include Mar's six core principles of Casual Luxury. Mar and his pup Violet find time for a much-needed minibreak to pet-friendly locations and shopping in NYC right before the final makeover reveal delights with surprise guests.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia and Japan: Taking his obsession with the film Apocalypse Now a little too seriously, Tony sets out for Pailin, reputed to be one of the most dangerous towns on earth. After his journey, Tony returns to Japan.

programme.title: Tastes Like Home
programme.desc: What dish would most remind Sarah-Jo of her family in Gorey? Her mother Marian's Chicken Paprika dish. Catherine travels to Boston where she will prepare Sarah-Jo's favorite dish for her, while also exploring Boston's exciting city life.

programme.title: Savour Australia
programme.desc: Jason visits Australia's oldest winery in Adelaide and has a memorable visit in one of Australia's top dining experiences, Restaurant Orana. For some sightseeing, he rides a bike through the sensational Barossa Valley.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: The dishes Jeremy showcases are perfect for the family, beginning with a Malaysian Chicken Curry. Joe Swash focuses on Vegan Pad Thai. At the barbecue, Jeremy cooks up Korean BBQ Beef and Banchan, and for dessert, a Macha Mille Crepe Cake.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On a cruise to Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet culture of its local farmers, not the dazzling side of Greece’s party island. Join her as she cooks with a young chef who is breathing new life into the island's traditional recipes.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Kathy McCabe invites you to experience the essence of Rome. Discover the Testaccio Market's incredible food, taste true Roman Cacio e Pepe and gelato, learn the beautiful craft of mosaics, and attend a grand ball at Palazzo Brancaccio.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: The Bronx is not only known as the Borough of Salsa, it is also known as the Borough of Music. Follow Mickela as she delves into the longstanding Puerto Rican musical style whose influence stretches across New York City.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Utrera, Spain contains a strong flamenco heritage, as is evident at the lively Potaje Gitano Festival. Mickela then meets a six-year-old flamenco dancer named Carmen, sits with singer Tomas De Perrate, and becomes an honorary Bell Ringer.

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly
programme.desc: Colleen and her sister take aim at clay shooting, learn how to harvest mussels in a stunning fjord, ride bicycles around Westport, dance to traditional Irish music at Matt Molloy's pub, and go horseback riding along the Tullan Strand.

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly
